name: Beef Stew#2
recipeIngredient: cream of mushroom soup (1 can, 14 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut vegetables into bite-sized pieces: potatoes, carrots, onions, celery.
2. Purchase the least expensive piece of beef or chicken and cut it into bite-sized pieces, removing most of the fat and marbling.
3. Place all ingredients in a crock pot.
4. Add 1 can of cream of mushroom soup (14 oz) and 1 can of tomato soup (14 oz).
5. Pour in about 1/2 to 1 cup of cold water.
6. Cook for 5-8 hours on low or medium heat.
7. Do not add seasonings until after the first cooking period, if desired. A little pepper is all that's needed.
